questions.text: The equation x = 5 represents a line parallel to:
questions.explanation: x = 5 is a vertical line passing through x = 5. Vertical lines are parallel to y-axis.

questions.text: A linear equation in two variables has infinitely many solutions.
questions.explanation: A linear equation in two variables (ax + by + c = 0) has infinitely many solutions, each represented by a point on the line.

questions.text: What is the standard form of linear equation in two variables?
questions.correctAnswer: ax + by + c = 0, where a, b, c are real numbers and a, b not both zero
questions.explanation: Standard form is ax + by + c = 0 where a and b are coefficients of x and y, c is constant. At least one of a or b must be non-zero.
